name: Android Dev Environment Setup
tagline: Turn your Android phone into a real development machine. No root required.
description: I'll configure a full Linux development environment on your Android device using Termux — Python, Node, Git, SSH, local AI inference, the works. Built for developers who need a portable setup that actually works, not a toy terminal.
features: Termux full environment setup and hardening
SD card storage routing for large projects
pricing_model: Flat fee $99 / $49 add-on for custom tooling
estimated_roi_per_business: Replaces need for $500+ laptop for remote dev work
